headline: Lionsgate’s ‘Michael’ Wins Weekend Box Office in Fresh Record for Biopics
summary: The opening of the highly anticipated film was perfectly positioned ahead of the start of summer movie season, Comscore’s Paul Dergarabedian said.

headline: Disney has good pricing news for families
summary: The majority of Americans plan to take at least one domestic vacation this summer. Some 67% have seasonal travel planned, according to a survey conducted by U.S. News. However, tough economic conditions have caused many of those travelers to revise their original plans. Close to 65% of summer ...
